response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and recent experience building developer tooling (MCP frameworks at re:cinq), but his technical background is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His Java expertise is outdated (2014-2018), he has no Kotlin experience, zero exposure to Spring or enterprise frameworks, and no IDE internals background. The substantial gap between his recent full-stack web focus (TypeScript/Node.js) and the specialized JVM/IDE domain expertise required makes him a poor fit.
strengths: Demonstrated expertise in software craftsmanship, TDD, and code quality across multiple complex systems
Recent experience building developer tooling and frameworks (MCP generators at re:cinq) showing some IDE/tooling awareness
Proven ability to work on large-scale distributed systems handling millions of requests with performance optimization
concerns: Java experience is 7+ years old (2014-2018) with no recent JVM ecosystem work; no Kotlin experience whatsoever
Zero exposure to Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise Java frameworks—the primary technical focus of this role
Recent career entirely in full-stack web development (TypeScript/Node.js/React) rather than IDE internals or language tooling
